name: Hexxagon (3-player)
author: AGP
description: The three-player variant of Hexxagon (hex Ataxx). A hexagon-of-hexes (side 5, 61 cells) with 3 blocked holes near the center, leaving 58 playable hexes. Three players each start with 2 pieces on alternating corners (P0, P1, P2 around the ring, so each owns two opposite corners). Move one of your pieces onto an empty hex: clone into an adjacent hex (grow, keeping the original) or jump to a hex two away (relocating). Every piece of EITHER opponent next to where you land is infected and flips to your colour. A player with no move passes; eliminated players are skipped. Wiping out both opponents auto-fills the board for the survivor, who wins; otherwise the player with the most pieces wins when the board fills or no one can move.
